steps.title: Use the figure location
steps.content: The question asks for the location of the figures in A Promise. The relevant note says the painting depicts two men floating on the left side of the canvas, so the sentence must foreground that spatial detail.

steps.title: Reject size, mood, and color
steps.content: Choice B compares painting dimensions. Choice C discusses the tranquil mood across Rawles's works. Choice D describes the vivid blue colors of the water. The remaining choice identifies the two men and places them on the left side of the canvas. The answer is A.
